subcodes.first_line: The remembrance of God hath been raised betwixt earth and heaven from this Tongue which moveth not save in remembrance of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر الله قد ارتفع بین الارض و السماء من هذا اللسان الذی ماتحرک الا علی ذکر الله
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @high station of the true believer, @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @transcendence; unknowability of God
